mapper.select: SELECT * FROM batch.trigger_outbox_event WHERE publish_status IN (#{pendingStatus1}, #{pendingStatus2}) AND next_publish_at <= #{now} ORDER BY created_at ASC LIMIT #{limit} FOR UPDATE SKIP LOCKED
mapper.update: UPDATE batch.trigger_outbox_event SET publish_status = #{publishingStatus}, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE id = #{id} AND publish_status IN (#{pendingStatus1}, #{pendingStatus2})
UPDATE batch.trigger_outbox_event SET publish_status = #{status}, published_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE id = #{id}

UPDATE batch.trigger_outbox_event SET publish_status = #{status}, publish_attempt = publish_attempt + 1, last_error = #{lastError,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, next_publish_at = #{nextPublishAt}, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE id = #{id}

UPDATE batch.trigger_outbox_event SET publish_status = #{failedStatus}, last_error = #{lastError,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, next_publish_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE publish_status = #{publishingStatus} AND updated_at < CURRENT_TIMESTAMP - (#{timeoutSeconds} * interval '1 second')
mapper.select:
SELECT count(1) FROM batch.trigger_outbox_event WHERE publish_status IN
#{status}
SELECT count(1) FROM batch.trigger_outbox_event WHERE publish_status = #{publishingStatus} AND updated_at < CURRENT_TIMESTAMP - (#{timeoutSeconds} * interval '1 second')
